code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> Initializing: start_link(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)

    state Initializing {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> LoadConfig
        LoadConfig --> InitTransport
        InitTransport --> EstablishConnection
        EstablishConnection --> SendInitialize
        SendInitialize --> WaitForInitialized
        WaitForInitialized --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]
    }

    Initializing --> Connected: initialized received

    state Connected {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> Active

        Active --> ResourceOperations: list/read/subscribe
        Active --> ToolOperations: call_tool
        Active --> PromptOperations: list/get

        ResourceOperations --> Active
        ToolOperations --> Active
        PromptOperations --> Active

        Active --> Subscribing: subscribe_resource
        Subscribing --> Active: subscription_confirmed
    }

    Connected --> Paused: pause_requested
    Paused --> Connected: resume_requested

    Connected --> Reconnecting: transport_error
    Reconnecting --> Connected: reconnect_success
    Reconnecting --> Failed: reconnect_failed(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)

    Connected --> GracefulShutdown: shutdown notification
    GracefulShutdown --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]: cleanup_complete

    Connected --> AbnormalShutdown: critical_error
    AbnormalShutdown --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: cleanup_complete

    %% Session Backend Transitions
    note right of Connected
        Session Persistence:
        - ETS: In-memory
        - DETS: Disk-based
        - Mnesia: Cluster
    end note

    %% Reconnection Strategy
    state Reconnecting {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> Backoff
        Backoff --> ReconnectAttempt
        ReconnectAttempt --> Success
        ReconnectAttempt --> Failure

        Success --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]
        Failure --> IncrementRetryCount
        IncrementRetryCount --> CheckMaxRetries

        CheckMaxRetries --> Backoff: below_max
        CheckMaxRetries --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]: exceeded_max
    }

    %% State Transition Details
    Connected --> SessionValidation: periodic_health_check
    SessionValidation --> Connected: healthy
    SessionValidation --> Failed: unhealthy(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)

    %% Session Restoration (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
    note right of Reconnecting
        Failover Modes:
        - Local: Restart process
        - Remote: Mnesia replica
        - Recovery: Load from DETS
    end note

    %% Subscription Management
    state Subscribing {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> RegisterSubscription
        RegisterSubscription --> SetupWatcher
        SetupWatcher --> ConfirmSubscription
        ConfirmSubscription --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]
    }

    %% Cleanup on Shutdown
    state GracefulShutdown {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> UnsubscribeResources
        UnsubscribeResources --> DrainPendingRequests
        DrainPendingRequests --> CloseTransport
        CloseTransport --> PersistSession
        PersistSession --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]
    }

    %% Error States
    state AbnormalShutdown {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> LogError
        LogError --> PersistCrashDump
        PersistCrashDump --> NotifyDependents
        NotifyDependents --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]
    }

    %% Session State Fields
    note right of Connected
        Session State:
        - session_id: UUID
        - transport_pid: PID
        - pending_requests: map(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
        - subscriptions: map(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
        - capabilities: #capabilities{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode}
        - last_activity: timestamp(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
        - backend: ets | dets | mnesia
    end note

    %% Activity Monitoring
    Connected --> IdleTimeout: no_activity(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)
    IdleTimeout --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: session_expired

    %% Rate Limiting
    Connected --> RateLimited: request_rate_exceeded
    RateLimited --> Connected: backoff_complete
    RateLimited --> Failed: rate_limit_persistent

    %% Resource Watcher Lifecycle
    state ResourceOperations {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> Watching
        Watching --> NotificationReceived: resource_changed
        NotificationReceived --> DeliverNotification
        DeliverNotification --> Watching
    }

    %% Tool Execution Lifecycle
    state ToolOperations {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> Executing
        Executing --> InProgress: long_running_op
        InProgress --> ProgressUpdate: send_progress
        ProgressUpdate --> InProgress
        InProgress --> Complete: finished
        Complete --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]
    }

    %% Session Backend Selection
    note left of Initializing
        Backend Selection:
        {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker}
        - Fastest: O(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) access
        - Volatile: Lost on crash

        {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream}
        - Durable: Disk persistence
        - Slower: I/O overhead

        {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController}
        - Distributed: Cluster sync
        - CAP: Consistency trade-offs
    end note

    %% Health Check States
    Connected --> HealthCheck: periodic_timer
    HealthCheck --> Connected: all_systems_go
    HealthCheck --> Degraded: subsystem_failure
    Degraded --> Connected: recovery_complete
    Degraded --> Failed: recovery_failed

    %% Session Restoration Flow
    note right of Reconnecting
        Restoration Priority:
        1. Restore subscriptions
        2. Replay pending requests
        3. Restore capabilities
        4. Resume monitoring
    end note
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网边缘节点设计一个完整的状态机，核心是要处理TelemetryStream的生命周期管理。首先，系统启动时应该有个Initializing状态，里面包含从配置加载到建立MQTT连接的完整流程。
明白了，Initializing是一个复合状态。我理解为EdgeNode启动TelemetryStream时，内部依次执行LoadConfig、InitTransport、EstablishConnection，最后SendInitialize等待PLC确认？
对，WaitForInitialized之后要指向PLC逻辑，表示硬件层面的初始化确认。一旦收到initialized消息，就进入Connected状态。
好的，Initializing复合状态已绘制。现在处理Connected状态，这也是复合状态，包含Active以及三种操作类型对吧？
没错，Active是核心，支持list/read/subscribe资源操作、call_tool工具调用、还有prompt的list/get。这些操作完成后都回到Active。另外要有一个Subscribing子状态专门处理订阅确认流程。
Connected复合状态已完成，包括Active和Subscribing。接下来处理状态转换，Connected可以进入Paused和Reconnecting？
是的，pause和resume是常规控制。transport_error触发Reconnecting，这个状态比较复杂，需要设计重连策略。
Reconnecting作为复合状态，我设计为：Backoff等待→ReconnectAttempt尝试→成功则回Connected，失败则IncrementRetryCount→CheckMaxRetries，未超限继续Backoff，超限则转到Failed并涉及ActuatorController？
准确。CheckMaxRetries超限后要指向PLC逻辑，这是关键安全设计。另外Success路径也要通知ActuatorController。
Reconnecting复合状态已完成。现在补充两种关闭路径：GracefulShutdown和AbnormalShutdown？
对，GracefulShutdown是正常关闭，要优雅地清理：先UnsubscribeResources，然后DrainPendingRequests，关闭传输，持久化会话，最后终止。AbnormalShutdown是紧急路径，记录错误、保存崩溃转储、通知依赖方。
GracefulShutdown完成后指向ActuatorController，AbnormalShutdown完成后指向PLC逻辑，这样区分对吗？
正确。现在需要补充会话持久化的细节，Connected状态要有SessionValidation的健康检查机制。
SessionValidation已添加，健康则保持Connected，不健康则进入Failed并关联MQTT Broker。我还注意到需要IdleTimeout处理无活动场景？
是的，TelemetryStream无活动时触发IdleTimeout，会话过期后通知MQTT Broker。还有RateLimited限流状态也不能少。
RateLimited已添加，可恢复则回Connected，持续超限则Failed。现在细化ResourceOperations，它应该包含Watching和通知投递循环？
对，Watching监控资源变化，收到通知后DeliverNotification，然后回到Watching。ToolOperations也需要细化，支持长时间运行的操作。
ToolOperations复合状态已完成，ProgressUpdate和InProgress形成循环，Complete后返回MQTT Broker。Subscribing内部流程需要补充吗？
需要，Subscribing应该包含RegisterSubscription、SetupWatcher、ConfirmSubscription，最后确认后回到EdgeNode。
Subscribing复合状态已完成。现在添加注释说明会话持久化方案：ETS内存、DETS磁盘、Mnesia集群三种后端？
对，这个注释放在Connected右侧。另外Initializing左侧需要Backend Selection的说明，对比三种后端的特性。
我理解MQTT Broker代表最快但易失的ETS，TelemetryStream代表持久但有I/O开销的DETS，ActuatorController涉及分布式和CAP权衡的Mnesia？
完全正确。Reconnecting右侧还需要Failover Modes的注释，说明本地重启、远程副本、DETS恢复三种故障转移模式。
Failover Modes注释已添加。Connected还需要详细的Session State字段说明，包括session_id、transport_pid、pending_requests等？
对，pending_requests关联ActuatorController，subscriptions和capabilities、last_activity都关联EdgeNode，backend是ets|dets|mnesia。
Session State注释已完成。Reconnecting还需要Restoration Priority注释，说明恢复优先级：订阅、请求重放、能力恢复、监控恢复。
补充两个健康相关状态：HealthCheck定期检查和Degraded降级状态。HealthCheck正常保持Connected，异常进入Degraded。
HealthCheck和Degraded状态已添加，Degraded可恢复则回Connected，失败则进入Failed。我检查一下整体结构，GracefulShutdown和AbnormalShutdown的TerminateProcess终点需要确认。
GracefulShutdown的TerminateProcess应该回到ActuatorController，AbnormalShutdown的TerminateProcess回到PLC逻辑，和之前一致。
已核对一致。现在有个问题：Initializing内部的WaitForInitialized指向PLC逻辑，但Reconnecting的CheckMaxRetries超限也指向PLC逻辑，这样设计是 intentional 的吗？
是的，都是硬件安全相关的终点。初始化失败和重连耗尽都需要PLC介入处理。Reconnecting的Success路径我再看一下，应该指向ActuatorController。
发现需要修正：Reconnecting的Success当前没有明确终点，应该指向ActuatorController。另外Backoff到ReconnectAttempt的流转需要确认是自动触发还是有条件？
Backoff等待超时后自动进入ReconnectAttempt。Success修正为指向ActuatorController正确。
已修正Success指向。检查Subscribing流程：RegisterSubscription→SetupWatcher→ConfirmSubscription→EdgeNode，这个闭环正确吗？
正确，ConfirmSubscription完成后回到EdgeNode的Active状态。ResourceOperations的Watching循环也需要确认。
Watching循环已确认：Watching→NotificationReceived→DeliverNotification→Watching。现在验证所有注释位置：Session Persistence在Connected右，Backend Selection在Initializing左，Failover Modes和Restoration Priority在Reconnecting右。
还有Session State注释也在Connected右侧。需要确保所有涉及EdgeNode、MQTT Broker、TelemetryStream、ActuatorController、PLC Logic的关联都正确。
核对发现：Initializing的起点是EdgeNode通过start_link启动TelemetryStream，这个箭头需要明确。另外Initializing内部LoadConfig的起点是MQTT Broker？
对，Initializing复合状态内部以MQTT Broker为起点开始LoadConfig。整体起点是EdgeNode启动TelemetryStream进入Initializing。
起点和内部流程已确认。最后检查：ToolOperations的Complete指向MQTT Broker，而Subscribing的ConfirmSubscription指向EdgeNode，这种不对称是设计意图吗？
是设计意图。工具执行完成后通知Broker进行后续处理，而订阅确认直接回到EdgeNode继续Active状态。这种区分反映了不同的控制流归属。
所有核心状态已绘制完成。建议最后验证一下状态转换的完整性：Connected有到Paused、Reconnecting、GracefulShutdown、AbnormalShutdown、SessionValidation、IdleTimeout、RateLimited、HealthCheck的出边，是否遗漏？
检查完整，Connected的出边都覆盖了。HealthCheck和Degraded是新补充的，确保Degraded有recovery_complete回Connected和recovery_failed到Failed。
Degraded的双向出边已确认。整个状态机包含：Initializing、Connected、Paused、Reconnecting、Failed、GracefulShutdown、AbnormalShutdown、Subscribing、ResourceOperations、ToolOperations等复合状态，以及所有注释。结构完整。
很好，这个设计完整覆盖了工业物联网边缘节点的生命周期管理，从启动初始化、正常运行、故障重连到优雅关闭和异常处理，会话持久化和健康检查机制也都到位了。可以定稿。
